data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Upcoming inspection reminders' as part of the safety inspection process. However, the evidence does not include any details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of such reminders. The linked use case mentions the need for upcoming inspection reminders but does not provide any supporting evidence that this feature is implemented or operational, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of upcoming inspection reminders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate upcoming inspection reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that upcoming inspection reminders are generated and sent to relevant stakeholders.
